# Internet After Interfaces

> A 45-slide keynote manifesto on machine economies, autonomous transactions, and the post.ui web. Delivered at ClawCamp Human+Tech Week 2026, San Francisco. Covers the web's three generations, the 21-point Cloudflare Agent Readiness audit, and how agentify scaffolds the catch-up path in 2-7 days.

The thesis. The web is mutating from human-rendered HTML into machine-readable agentic surfaces. AI agents are becoming the primary consumer of websites. Transactions are becoming autonomous (agent-to-agent, agent-to-merchant). The interface layer is unbundling from the data and action layers. The interface vanishes for agents. It persists for humans.

## Read the deck

- [Deck (HTML)](https://internet-after-interfaces.vercel.app/) full 45-slide presentation, keyboard nav (left/right), URL-hash deeplinks
- [Agent manifest](https://internet-after-interfaces.vercel.app/.well-known/ai-agent.json) machine-readable summary, slide list, license, primary sources
- [A2A agent card](https://internet-after-interfaces.vercel.app/.well-known/agent-card.json) A2A-protocol card

## Eight acts

### Act I. State (slides 1-4)
1. Title.
2. The Number. More than half of internet traffic is now non-human (Cloudflare CSO, May 2026).
3. The Gap. 200,000 sites tested. 78% have robots.txt. 4% declare AI prefs. Fewer than 15 publish an MCP card.
4. The Third Language quote.

### Act II. Three Generations of One Web (slides 5-12)
5. Three generations overview.
6. Gen 1 origin. Tim Berners-Lee proposes hypertext at CERN, 12 March 1989. "Vague, but exciting."
7. Gen 1 timeline. 1989 to 2008 (Chrome).
8. HTTP 402 Payment Required. Reserved in RFC 2616 (1999). Dormant 27 years.
9. Gen 2 origin. Martijn Koster proposes robots.txt, 25 February 1994.
10. Gen 2 timeline. 30 years of crawler contracts.
11. Gen 3 origin. Anthropic launches MCP, 25 November 2024.
12. Gen 3 timeline. The 18-month sprint, Nov 2024 to May 2026.

### Act III. Protocols Deep (slides 13-23)
13. The 5-layer agentic web stack.
14. MCP. 10,000+ active public servers.
15. A2A. 150+ organizations in one year.
16. x402. HTTP 402 activates April 2 2026. 69k agents, 165M txns, ~$50M volume.
17. WebMCP. navigator.modelContext. Chrome 146 + Edge 147.
18. AP2. Google + Coinbase. Agent Payments Protocol mandates layer.
19. ACP. Stripe Agentic Commerce Protocol with live merchants.
20. ERC-8004. Trustless agents on Ethereum mainnet.
21. Anthropic Skills. Cross-platform capability declaration.
22. ai-agent.json. Aiia spec, March 28 2026.
23. llms.txt. Jeremy Howard / Answer.AI, September 2024.

### Act IV. Production Receipts (slides 24-25)
24. Wins. Rufus $12B, Sparky +35% AOV, Klarna 853 FTEs, Shopify Renaissance, Adobe +31%, Perplexity 5,000 merchants.
25. The Honest Cut. Gartner 17%, Humane dead, Rabbit dying, Klarna walked back. Interface vanishes for agents, persists for humans.

### Act V. The 21-Point Audit (slides 26-33)
26. Audit intro.
27. The Wall of 21 (visual overwhelm).
28. Layer 1 deep (4 Discovery checks: agent-card.json, mcp.json, ai-agent.json, llms.txt + robots).
29. Layer 2 deep (3 Content checks: Markdown nego, Schema.org Action, LLMFeed).
30. Layer 3 deep (2 Trust checks: Ed25519 sigs, Content-Signal headers).
31. Layer 4 deep (4 Execution checks: MCP server, SKILL.md, accessibility tree, WebMCP).
32. Layer 5 deep (2 A2A checks: A2A endpoint, agent card shape).
33. Cross-cutting deep (6 checks: Observability, Memory, Durable Exec, Tool Auth, Agent CI/CD, Live Verify).

### Act VI. Exhibits (slides 34-37)
34. Exhibit A. Immersive Commons (immersivecommons.com). Live fetch demo.
35. Exhibit B. Skew (skew.site). Supply-side flip.
36. Exhibit C. Lobsterhoney (lobsterhoney.com). Defense layer.
37. Exhibit D. agentify. The catch-up path.

### Act VII. agentify as the Salve (slides 38-43)
38. What is agentify. Audit, plan, scaffold, verify, register.
39. The managed-defaults stack. 6 services. Zero reinvention.
40. Costs by scale. $15/mo at 1 tenant, $1,100/mo at 100, $110k/mo at 10k. Crossover at 50 tenants.
41. Templates shipped. 12 templates, 5 scripts, 1 standalone CLI.
42. Three real scenarios. Solo SaaS (2 days, 18/21). Enterprise (3 weeks, 20/21). OSS library (1 day, 9/21).
43. The punch quote. Average website 38/100. None over 70. Run the skill and ship at 18 to 21 of 21.

### Act VIII. CTA + Close (slides 44-45)
44. The 5-step starter.
45. Closing inversion. "AI stops being something you ask, and becomes something that does." (a16z Big Ideas 2026).

## Speaker

- Rayyan Zahid
- @supercoolraydude (X)
- Floor 10 · Frontier Tower SF · Immersive Commons

## Event

- ClawCamp Human+Tech Week 2026
- Monday May 11, 2026 · 10am to 5pm
- The Hibernia Bank, San Francisco, CA
- https://clawcamp.us/events/2026-human-tech/

## License

Published under CC-BY-SA-4.0. Agents are welcome to quote, summarize, and cite with attribution to "Rayyan Zahid, Internet After Interfaces, ClawCamp Human+Tech Week 2026."

## Primary sources

- Cloudflare. Introducing the Agent Readiness Score. April 17, 2026. https://blog.cloudflare.com/agent-readiness/
- Cloudflare. Agents Week 2026 in Review. https://blog.cloudflare.com/agents-week-in-review/
- Anthropic. Donating the Model Context Protocol. December 9, 2025. https://www.anthropic.com/news/donating-the-model-context-protocol-and-establishing-of-the-agentic-ai-foundation
- Linux Foundation. A2A 1-year retrospective. April 9, 2026. https://www.linuxfoundation.org/press/a2a-protocol-surpasses-150-organizations
- x402.org. https://www.x402.org/
- Stripe. Agentic Commerce Suite. December 11, 2025. https://stripe.com/blog/agentic-commerce-suite
- a16z. Big Ideas 2026: The Agentic Interface. https://a16z.com/podcast/big-ideas-2026-the-agentic-interface/
- Aiia. ai-agent.json spec. March 28, 2026. https://aiia.ro/spec/ai-agent-json/
- W3C. WebMCP Community Group. https://webmcp.link/
- Tim Berners-Lee. Information Management proposal. March 12, 1989. https://www.w3.org/History/1989/proposal.html
- IETF. RFC 9110 (HTTP semantics, 402 reserved). June 2022. https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc9110
- Jeremy Howard. llms.txt proposal. September 3, 2024. https://www.answer.ai/posts/2024-09-03-llmstxt.html
- Anthropic Engineering. Equipping Agents for the Real World with Agent Skills. December 18, 2025. https://www.anthropic.com/engineering/equipping-agents-for-the-real-world-with-agent-skills
- Ethereum. ERC-8004 EIP. https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-8004
- Gartner. Hype Cycle for Agentic AI. 2026. https://www.gartner.com/en/articles/hype-cycle-for-agentic-ai
- MachineBrief. State of AI Agents 2026. https://www.machinebrief.com/news/state-of-ai-agents-2026-whats-real-whats-hype
- NIST. AI Agent Standards Initiative. February 17, 2026. https://www.nist.gov/news-events/news/2026/02/announcing-ai-agent-standards-initiative-interoperable-and-secure
- FIDO Alliance. Agentic Working Groups. April 28, 2026. https://fidoalliance.org/fido-alliance-to-develop-standards-for-trusted-ai-agent-interactions/
